expectations.text: Output contains implementation tasks with specific file paths
expectations.evidence: 8 design sections with file paths: Gemfile, app/models/user.rb, app/controllers/settings_controller.rb, config/routes.rb, views, assets, JS controller, CSS
Dependencies (1) -> Model (2) -> Controller (3) -> Views (4) -> Default avatar (5) -> S3 config (6) -> JS (7) -> CSS (8)
No dedicated Acceptance Criteria section with AC-N numbering. Test plan uses numbered GWT table rows (1-14) but they are not formatted as AC-N acceptance criteria.
Test scenarios 1, 2, 8 cover successful upload. Scenarios 11, 12 cover display.
Test scenarios 3, 4, 10 cover oversized and invalid type rejection.
Test scenario 5 (replace), 9 (remove), 13 (default fallback). Edge cases section covers existing users, HEIC, CDN caching.
Full test plan with Unit (7 scenarios), Integration (3 scenarios), System (4 scenarios) in GWT table format.
All sections have specific details, code samples, and configuration.
